# Installing Intercom

Here you'll find everything you need to install Intercom in the following places:

- [Web](/installing-intercom/web/installation)
- [iOS](/installing-intercom/ios/installation)
- [Android](/installing-intercom/android/installation)
- [Cordova](/installing-intercom/cordova-phonegap/installation)


Otherwise, you can utilise our quickstart guides and tutorials if you need to get set up faster with the basics, or get technical information uncovered elsewhere:

- Tutorials on setting up [custom domains for your Help Center](/docs/guides/help-center/custom-domains)
- Chat with other Intercom customers, who've installed the Messenger, [in our community forum.](https://community.intercom.com/messenger-8)


New to Intercom?
For more information about Intercom products, you can [visit our website](https://www.intercom.com/) or read [our user documentation](https://www.intercom.com/help/en/).
